info.title: FinOps Watch — AI Engine
info.description: Production AI Engine for TF2 FinOps Watch. Detects AWS cost anomalies via per-mechanism statistical detectors, plans containment actions, and verifies remediation outcomes. Contract: ai-api-contract.md v1.5.0.

get.description: Called by ALB and ECS Fargate every 30 seconds. No authentication required. Returns overall status and dependency health.

post.description: Accepts CUR + CE telemetry, runs the anomaly detection engine, and returns a list of detected anomalies synchronously. Requires X-Tenant-Id, X-Idempotency-Key, X-Payload-SHA256, X-Request-Timestamp, and X-Dry-Run-Mode headers.

Accepts an anomaly context from /v1/detect, runs root cause analysis, and returns a containment action plan with AWS CLI payloads and dashboard data. X-Correlation-Id must match the correlation_id returned by /v1/detect.

403.description: Anomaly belongs to a different tenant

post.description: CDO submits post-action telemetry. AI Engine evaluates whether the cost anomaly resolved and returns next_action: DONE | RETRY | ROLLBACK | ESCALATE.

get.description: Poll the current remediation status for a specific anomaly_id. If the tenant is in LOCKED_MODE, response headers will include X-Containment-Status: LOCKED.

403.description: Anomaly belongs to a different tenant

post.description: CDO notifies the AI Engine that a remediation was manually rolled back (e.g. false positive). Updates the false-positive counter for model feedback and recalculates the error budget.

target.title: Target
target.description: Resource ARN or ID that was acted upon

ActionExecuted.title: ActionExecuted
ActionExecuted.description: Details of the containment action the CDO executed.

timestamp.title: Timestamp
timestamp.description: RFC3339 UTC timestamp of this action

target.title: Target
target.description: Resource ARN or ID this step targets

AlertRouting.title: AlertRouting
AlertRouting.description: Which dashboards should receive this anomaly alert.

resource_id.title: Resource Id
resource_id.description: AWS resource ARN or logical ID

resource_id.title: Resource Id
resource_id.description: AWS resource ARN or logical ID

ai_model_used.title: Ai Model Used
ai_model_used.description: Model or rule that produced this finding

AnomalyItem.title: AnomalyItem
AnomalyItem.description: One detected anomaly in the detect response.

aws_cli_command.title: Aws Cli Command
aws_cli_command.description: Complete AWS CLI command for CDO to run

AppliedPayload.title: AppliedPayload
AppliedPayload.description: AWS CLI command to execute the containment action.

traffic_volume.title: Traffic Volume
traffic_volume.description: Request/traffic volume for the batch window

campaign_flag.title: Campaign Flag
campaign_flag.description: True if a marketing campaign is active (benign-cost context)

load_test_flag.title: Load Test Flag
load_test_flag.description: True if a load test is running (benign-cost context)

migration_flag.title: Migration Flag
migration_flag.description: True if a data migration is running (benign-cost context)

is_estimated.title: Is Estimated
is_estimated.description: True if CE cost is still estimated/unfinalized

region.title: Region
region.description: AWS region; null/'global' for global services

CEDailyItem.title: CEDailyItem
CEDailyItem.description: One row from aws_cost_explorer_daily (macro-level daily grain).

pricing_unit.title: Pricing Unit
pricing_unit.description: Billing unit, e.g. Hrs, GB, GB-Mo

CURLineItem.title: CURLineItem
CURLineItem.description: One resource-level CUR line item (micro-level detail).

ComparisonWindow.title: ComparisonWindow
ComparisonWindow.description: Date window for the CE-fallback gap (contract §5.1, telemetry §6.2).

DataConfidence.title: DataConfidence
DataConfidence.description: Detect response confidence in the underlying telemetry (contract §5.1).

correlation_id.title: Correlation Id
correlation_id.description: UUID v4 — must match correlation_id from /v1/detect

dry_run_mode.title: Dry Run Mode
dry_run_mode.description: True = generate plan only, do not execute

applied_payload.aws_cli_command: aws ec2 create-tags --resources i-0abcd1234efgh5678 --tags Key=finops:review,Value=pending Key=finops:anomaly-id,Value=ANM-2026-0626A --region ap-southeast-1

root_cause_analysis.technical_reason: EC2 g4dn.xlarge running 100% of 24h with no scheduled training jobs.

finance_dashboard_data.executive_summary: GPU instance running idle for 3 days — $427/day waste detected.

rollback_payload.aws_cli_rollback_command: aws ec2 delete-tags --resources i-0abcd1234efgh5678 --tags Key=finops:review Key=finops:anomaly-id --region ap-southeast-1

data_source_type.description: RAW_JSON = inline data; S3_POINTER = S3 URI

business_context.description: Required every batch — traffic/campaign context for FP suppression

telemetry_delay_event.title: Telemetry Delay Event
telemetry_delay_event.description: True = CUR not yet finalized; AI Engine falls back to CE and lowers confidence

aws_cost_explorer_daily.title: Aws Cost Explorer Daily
aws_cost_explorer_daily.description: CE daily rows — required only when telemetry_delay_event=true

missing_resources.title: Missing Resources
missing_resources.description: Required when telemetry_delay_event=true: service codes in CE but not yet in CUR

current_ce_cost_gap_usd.title: Current Ce Cost Gap Usd
current_ce_cost_gap_usd.description: Required when telemetry_delay_event=true: total USD gap of missing_resources

s3_bucket_uri.title: S3 Bucket Uri
s3_bucket_uri.description: Required when data_source_type=S3_POINTER. Bucket: company-cdo-{account_id}-telemetry. Accepts .json.gz (Athena export) or .csv.gz (native AWS CUR — no conversion needed).

callback_url.title: Callback Url
callback_url.description: Optional: AI Engine POSTs a copy of DetectResponse after 200 (audit)

callback_token.title: Callback Token
callback_token.description: Optional: echoed in X-Callback-Token on the callback

success.title: Success
success.description: True if processing completed without error

correlation_id.title: Correlation Id
correlation_id.description: UUID v4 trace ID for this detection session

anomalies_detected.title: Anomalies Detected
anomalies_detected.description: True if at least one anomaly was found

data_confidence.description: HIGH = CUR complete; LOW = CE fallback (telemetry_delay_event)

anomalies_list.title: Anomalies List
anomalies_list.description: List of detected anomalies (may be empty)

EngineeringDashboardData.title: EngineeringDashboardData
EngineeringDashboardData.description: Payload for Engineering Console & Slack alert.

ErrorResponse.title: ErrorResponse
ErrorResponse.description: Standard error envelope returned on 4xx/5xx responses.

EscalationBundle.title: EscalationBundle
EscalationBundle.description: Context package for on-call engineer when next_action=ESCALATE.

FinanceDashboardData.title: FinanceDashboardData
FinanceDashboardData.description: Payload for Finance Dashboard / CFO — no technical detail.

timestamp.title: Timestamp
timestamp.description: RFC3339 UTC timestamp of this check

aws_cost_explorer_daily.title: Aws Cost Explorer Daily
aws_cost_explorer_daily.description: CE rows observed after the containment action

PostTelemetryWindow.title: PostTelemetryWindow
PostTelemetryWindow.description: Post-action telemetry — same structure as detect request (simplified).

audit_id.title: Audit Id
audit_id.description: Audit-record identifier (UUID v4) — audit chain, telemetry §16

anomaly_id.title: Anomaly Id
anomaly_id.description: Anomaly ID (ANM-YYYY-MMDD{A-Z}) — matches the path param

containment_locked.title: Containment Locked
containment_locked.description: True if tenant is in LOCKED_MODE (dry-run only)

ResourceUtilizationMetric.title: ResourceUtilizationMetric
ResourceUtilizationMetric.description: CloudWatch metric snapshot for one resource.

original_resource_id.title: Original Resource Id
original_resource_id.description: Original resource ARN — verify rollback target

RollbackPayload.title: RollbackPayload
RollbackPayload.description: AWS CLI command to undo the containment action.

reason.title: Reason
reason.description: Why the rollback was triggered (e.g. False Positive)

rolled_back_by.title: Rolled Back By
rolled_back_by.description: Email of engineer who initiated rollback

example.reason: False positive — instance is used for approved experiment

rollback_recorded.title: Rollback Recorded
rollback_recorded.description: True if audit log was updated

false_positive_count_updated.title: False Positive Count Updated
false_positive_count_updated.description: True if FP counter was incremented for model feedback

new_error_budget_burned_pct.title: New Error Budget Burned Pct
new_error_budget_burned_pct.description: Updated error budget burn percentage after this event

containment_locked.title: Containment Locked
containment_locked.description: True if LOCKED_MODE was triggered by this rollback

example.message: Error budget exceeded 1%. Tenant switched to LOCKED_MODE — all containment actions will be dry-run only.

correlation_id.title: Correlation Id
correlation_id.description: UUID v4 — must match across detect→decide→verify

success.title: Success
success.description: True if cost metric returned to baseline

regression_detected.title: Regression Detected
regression_detected.description: True if post-action cost spiked as side-effect
